prompt_text: Create a weekly meal and fitness plan for someone living in a dorm with limited kitchen access.
response_text:
# Weekly Dorm-Friendly Meal & Fitness Plan

## KITCHEN SETUP (Minimal)
- Microwave, mini-fridge, hot plate/electric kettle
- Basic utensils, cutting board, sharp knife
- Storage containers

---

## MONDAY

**Meals:**
- **Breakfast:** Overnight oats (oats + milk + banana, made night before)
- **Lunch:** Deli turkey sandwich + apple + almonds
- **Dinner:** Microwaved rice bowl (instant rice + canned black beans + salsa)
- **Snack:** Greek yogurt + granola

**Fitness:**
- 20 min: Dorm room circuit (no equipment)
  - 10 push-ups
  - 15 bodyweight squats
  - 30-sec plank
  - Repeat 4x

---

## TUESDAY

**Meals:**
- **Breakfast:** Scrambled eggs + toast (hot plate)
- **Lunch:** Tuna salad (canned tuna + mayo + crackers)
- **Dinner:** Pasta with jarred marinara + frozen veggies
- **Snack:** String cheese + berries

**Fitness:**
- 30 min: Walk/jog campus or nearby park
- 10 min: Stretching in room

---

## WEDNESDAY

**Meals:**
- **Breakfast:** Cereal + milk + banana
- **Lunch:** Peanut butter & jelly sandwich + carrot sticks
- **Dinner:** Microwaved sweet potato + canned chickpeas + olive oil
- **Snack:** Popcorn (microwave packets)

**Fitness:**
- 25 min: YouTube HIIT workout (bodyweight)
- Core focus: planks, mountain climbers, leg raises

---

## THURSDAY

**Meals:**
- **Breakfast:** Instant oatmeal with cinnamon + berries
- **Lunch:** Rotisserie chicken (store-bought) + rice + broccoli (microwaved)
- **Dinner:** Quesadilla (tortilla + cheese + canned beans, hot plate)
- **Snack:** Trail mix + apple

**Fitness:**
- 20 min: Strength focus
  - Tricep dips (using chair)
  - Wall sits
  - Lunges
  - Repeat 3x

---

## FRIDAY

**Meals:**
- **Breakfast:** Yogurt parfait (yogurt + granola + honey)
- **Lunch:** Egg salad sandwich + grapes
- **Dinner:** Ramen upgraded (add frozen veggies, egg, hot sauce)
- **Snack:** Hummus + pita chips

**Fitness:**
- 30 min: Walk/explore campus or light cardio video
- Rest/recovery focus

---

## SATURDAY

**Meals:**
- **Breakfast:** Scrambled eggs + avocado toast
- **Lunch:** Meal prep day—make 3 mason jar salads for next week
- **Dinner:** Treat meal (dining hall, nearby restaurant, or pizza)
- **Snack:** Chocolate + almonds

**Fitness:**
- 40 min: Longer walk or recreational activity
- Yoga/stretching video (20 min)

---

## SUNDAY

**Meals:**
- **Breakfast:** Pancakes (mix + hot plate) + berries
- **Lunch:** Leftover protein + veggies from prep
- **Dinner:** Microwaved burrito bowl (rice + beans + corn + cheese)
- **Snack:** Fruit + peanut butter

**Fitness:**
- Active recovery day
- 15 min: Light stretching/mobility work
- Optional: 20 min easy walk

---

## GROCERY SHOPPING LIST

**Proteins:**
- Eggs, Greek yogurt, canned tuna/chickpeas, deli meat, peanut butter

**Grains:**
- Bread, rice, pasta, oats, cereal, tortillas

**Produce:**
- Bananas, apples, berries, carrots, frozen broccoli, sweet potatoes

**Pantry:**
- Olive oil, salt, spices, canned beans, jarred marinara, salsa

**Convenience:**
- Rotisserie chicken, string cheese, nuts, granola

---

## TIPS FOR SUCCESS

✓ **Prep Sunday:** Cook rice, chop veggies, assemble containers  
✓ **Buy frozen:** Lasts longer, just as nutritious  
✓ **Use canned:** Beans, tuna, vegetables—budget-friendly  
✓ **Fitness alternatives:** YouTube, campus gym, outdoor spaces  
✓ **Stay hydrated:** Keep water bottle with you  
✓ **Adjust portions:** Based on your size/activity level  
✓ **Budget:** ~$10-12/day with smart shopping

This plan balances nutrition, convenience, and fitness without needing a full kitchen!
